project_type: TypeScript Fastify 5 multi-tenant API server with Prisma ORM + static HTML/JS frontend
build_system: npm scripts: prisma generate + tsc. ESM modules with .js extensions in imports.
test_framework: node:test with tsx runner, test files in server/test/*.test.ts. Frontend: jsdom-based smoke.js and test.js (node smoke.js).
verification_instructions: 1) cd server && npm run build (must exit 0). 2) cd server && npm test (all tests pass with DATABASE_URL set). 3) cd qi-webapp && node smoke.js (199 tests pass).
snapshot_or_generated_files: server/dist/ is gitignored build output. prisma/schema.prisma generates @prisma/client via prisma generate.
setup_instructions: cd server && npm ci && npx prisma generate. PostgreSQL must be running with DATABASE_URL=postgresql://qi:qi@localhost:5432/qi_platform?schema=public
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. PostgreSQL running locally. Node 22. No Docker daemon available for docker build validation in sandbox.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, no 'any' type. ESM with .js extensions. verbatimModuleSyntax: true. exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true. All existing 83 tests must pass.
key_patterns: Routes use Fastify plugin pattern (async function registered via app.register). Zod for request body validation. Prisma for all DB access (parameterized). authenticate preHandler hook for session check. requireRole factory for RBAC. Tests use app.inject() with buildTestApp() helper. Cookie-based sessions. Soft-delete with deletedAt field.
directory_structure: Root: docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf, qi-webapp/, server/. Server: src/ (app.ts, config.ts, db.ts, server.ts, auth/, middleware/, routes/), test/, prisma/. Frontend: qi-webapp/ (index.html, js/, css/, smoke.js, test.js).
